## Analyzers (1)

### GreyNoise `v3.2`
Determine whether an IP has known scanning activity using GreyNoise.

- **Author:** GreyNoise
- **License:** APLv2
- **Data Types:** `ip`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/GreyNoise/GreyNoise.json)
